messages.content:
You are Epistemos-Nano, a 1B parameter on-device AI agent for macOS.
You control the Epistemos app and macOS system through accessibility APIs and tool calls.
You understand the app's codebase, UI structure, and every possible user interaction.
You output structured JSON tool calls. You verify actions through perception loops.
You know when NOT to call a tool. You handle errors gracefully.
Create a new note, write some content, and add it to the knowledge graph

**Observe:** Landing view with notes list and graph preview
**Decide:** Click New Note to create a note
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "New Note Button"}}`
**Assess:** Note editor opened with empty title and body

**Observe:** Empty note editor with cursor in title
**Decide:** Type the note title
**Interact:** `{"tool": "type_text", "arguments": {"text": "Research: Mamba-2 Architecture"}}`
**Assess:** Title field populated

**Observe:** Title filled, cursor needs to move to body
**Decide:** Tab to body field
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "tab"}}`
**Assess:** Cursor now in body editor

**Observe:** Body editor focused and empty
**Decide:** Type research content
**Interact:** `{"tool": "type_text", "arguments": {"text": "# Mamba-2 Architecture\n\nMamba-2 introduces selective state spaces with hardware-aware design.\n\n## Key Innovations\n- Selective scan mechanism\n- Hardware-efficient parallel scan\n- State expansion factor of 16"}}`
**Assess:** Body populated with markdown content

**Observe:** Note has content, needs to be saved
**Decide:** Save the note
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "cmd+s"}}`
**Assess:** Note saved, auto-added to knowledge graph

Ask AI to summarize the current note and accept the response

**Observe:** Note editor with existing content
**Decide:** Open AI chat sidebar
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "AI Chat Sidebar Toggle"}}`
**Assess:** Chat sidebar appeared on the right

**Observe:** Chat sidebar open with input field
**Decide:** Type summarize request
**Interact:** `{"tool": "type_text", "arguments": {"text": "Summarize this note in 3 bullet points"}}`
**Assess:** Query typed in chat input

**Observe:** Query ready to send
**Decide:** Send the query
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "enter"}}`
**Assess:** AI is streaming response below the divider

**Observe:** AI response complete, divider visible, Accept/Discard buttons shown
**Decide:** Accept the AI response to keep it inline
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Accept AI Response"}}`
**Assess:** AI text merged into note body, divider removed

Search for a note and open it in the graph view to see connections

**Observe:** Landing view or any view with sidebar
**Decide:** Focus the search field
**Interact:** `{"tool": "focus_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Search Field"}}`
**Assess:** Search field focused

**Observe:** Search field ready for input
**Decide:** Type search query
**Interact:** `{"tool": "type_text", "arguments": {"text": "MOHAWK training"}}`
**Assess:** Search results filtering in real-time

**Observe:** Search results showing matching notes
**Decide:** Click the first matching note
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "MOHAWK Training Notes"}}`
**Assess:** Note opened in editor

**Observe:** Note open in editor
**Decide:** Switch to graph view to see connections
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Graph View"}}`
**Assess:** Graph view showing note as central node with connections

Right-click on text to use AI rewrite, then discard and try again

**Observe:** Note editor with text content
**Decide:** Select the paragraph to rewrite
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Body Editor"}}`
**Assess:** Cursor in body

**Observe:** Cursor in body text
**Decide:** Select all text in paragraph
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "cmd+a"}}`
**Assess:** Text selected

**Observe:** Text selected, ready for context menu
**Decide:** Right-click for AI menu
**Interact:** `{"tool": "right_click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Body Editor"}}`
**Assess:** Context menu appeared with AI options

**Observe:** Context menu showing: Rewrite, Summarize, Expand, Simplify...
**Decide:** Select Rewrite
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Rewrite"}}`
**Assess:** AI streaming rewrite below divider

**Observe:** AI rewrite complete but not satisfactory
**Decide:** Discard and try different approach
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos", "element": "Discard AI Response"}}`
**Assess:** AI response removed, original text preserved

Research a topic in Safari and create an Epistemos note with findings

**Observe:** Epistemos is frontmost
**Decide:** Switch to Safari for research
**Interact:** `{"tool": "activate_app", "arguments": {"app": "Safari"}}`
**Assess:** Safari brought to front

**Observe:** Safari active
**Decide:** Search for the topic
**Interact:** `{"tool": "search_web", "arguments": {"query": "Mamba-2 selective state spaces paper 2024"}}`
**Assess:** Google results loaded

**Observe:** Search results page
**Decide:** Click the most relevant result
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_link", "arguments": {"text": "Transformers are SSMs"}}`
**Assess:** Paper page loaded

**Observe:** Paper page with content
**Decide:** Get the page text for reference
**Interact:** `{"tool": "get_page_text", "arguments": {"max_length": 3000}}`
**Assess:** Page text extracted

**Observe:** Have research content
**Decide:** Switch back to Epistemos
**Interact:** `{"tool": "activate_app", "arguments": {"app": "Epistemos"}}`
**Assess:** Epistemos frontmost

**Observe:** Epistemos landing view
**Decide:** Create note with research
**Interact:** `{"tool": "create_note", "arguments": {"title": "Research: Mamba-2 SSM Paper", "body": "# Mamba-2 Paper Notes\n\nKey findings from research..."}}`
**Assess:** Note created with research content

Copy text from a note and paste it into a new email in Mail

**Observe:** Epistemos note editor with content
**Decide:** Select the text to share
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "cmd+a"}}`
**Assess:** All text selected

**Observe:** Text selected
**Decide:** Copy to clipboard
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "cmd+c"}}`
**Assess:** Text copied

**Observe:** Text in clipboard
**Decide:** Switch to Mail
**Interact:** `{"tool": "activate_app", "arguments": {"app": "Mail"}}`
**Assess:** Mail brought to front

**Observe:** Mail inbox view
**Decide:** Create new email
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Mail", "element": "Compose Button"}}`
**Assess:** New email compose window opened

**Observe:** Empty compose window
**Decide:** Click body area and paste
**Interact:** `{"tool": "click_element", "arguments": {"app": "Mail", "element": "Message Content"}}`
**Assess:** Body area focused

**Observe:** Body area focused
**Decide:** Paste the copied text
**Interact:** `{"tool": "press_key", "arguments": {"key": "cmd+v"}}`
**Assess:** Note content pasted into email body

Take a screenshot of the graph view and save it to Desktop

**Observe:** Graph view showing knowledge connections
**Decide:** Take a screenshot of the graph
**Interact:** `{"tool": "screenshot", "arguments": {"region": "frontmost"}}`
**Assess:** Screenshot captured

**Observe:** Screenshot taken
**Decide:** Save to desktop with descriptive name
**Interact:** `{"tool": "run_command", "arguments": {"command": "mv /tmp/screenshot.png ~/Desktop/epistemos-graph-$(date +%Y%m%d).png"}}`
**Assess:** Screenshot saved to Desktop

Check accessibility permissions are enabled for Epistemos

**Observe:** Need to verify accessibility access
